## 0.3.0

* Add support for multiple wake words in a single engine instance.
* Fix iOS build and runtime issues when using static linkage by adding OWW_EXPORT macro and HEADER_SEARCH_PATHS.
* Significant performance improvements for C++ runtime execution.
* Improved documentation comments and project metadata for better pub.dev score.

## 0.2.1

* Updates and improvements to pub.dev scoring.
* Move generated bindings to `src` directory to hide them from the public API.
* Add documentation comments to public API elements.

## 0.2.0

* Bumped version to include initial features and platforms.

## 0.1.2

* Performance improvements for openWakeWord C++ runtime execution.

## 0.1.1

* General bug fixes and stability improvements.

## 0.1.0

* Initial release of `open_wake_word` Flutter FFI plugin.
* Integrated [openWakeWord](https://github.com/dscripka/openWakeWord) for efficient on-device wake word detection.
* Added support for Android and iOS.
* Comprehensive README with installation and usage instructions.
* Licensed under Apache License 2.0.
